# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Remove or correct the invalid 'ignore = Ignore' line in the flake8 configuration file.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
grep -i 'ignore = Ignore' .flake8 setup.cfg tox.ini 2>/dev/null || true
sed -i '/ignore = Ignore/d' .flake8 2>/dev/null || true
sed -i '/ignore = Ignore/d' setup.cfg 2>/dev/null || true
sed -i '/ignore = Ignore/d' tox.ini 2>/dev/null || true
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
